about.title: What is TEDx?
about.body: TEDx is an independently organized event that brings the spirit of TED to local communities. Each TEDx introduces fresh ideas, new perspectives and the inspiration to change. The TEDxZhenysPark conference is officially licensed and the first regional-level event in the history of Turkestan.

theme.title: Renewal
theme.subtitle: Theme of 2026
theme.body: Renewal is learning from the past, rethinking the present and building tomorrow anew. We bring eight speakers to one stage — each with their own idea of renewal in their field.

tedx.a: TEDx is an independently organized event that brings the spirit of TED to local communities. Each TEDx introduces fresh ideas, new perspectives and the inspiration to change.

buyTicket.q: How do I buy a ticket?
buyTicket.a: Hit the "Get a ticket" button to message our manager on WhatsApp. They'll share the payment instructions and send back a personal ticket link once paid.

language.q: What language are the talks in?
language.a: Most talks will be in Kazakh. A few speakers may use Russian or English.

schedule.a: May 30, 2026. Doors open at 08:00, the first talk begins at 10:00. The full programme runs about 6 hours including breaks.

dressCode.a: Smart casual is recommended but not required. Wear what makes you comfortable for a 6-hour day.

kids.a: Children 12 and older are welcome with a ticket. The pace of the talks may be challenging for younger kids.

parking.a: Free parking is available next to Karavansaray Arena. We recommend arriving at least 30 minutes before the start.

refund.a: Tickets can be transferred to another person — message the manager on WhatsApp. Refunds are available up to 7 days before the event.

footer.rights: This independent TEDx event is operated under license from TED

ticket.issuedBody: Enter your name to generate the QR code you'll show at the entrance.
ticket.activatedBody: Show this QR code to a volunteer at the entrance.
ticket.usedBody: This ticket has already been checked in.
ticket.notFoundBody: The link may be invalid. Please contact the manager.
